name: desktop
description: MinaGuard desktop app — local Electron wrapper around the MinaGuard UI and indexer.
author: zkSecurity <hello@zksecurity.xyz>

scripts.prepare:schema-sql: mkdir -p assets && cd ../backend && node scripts/check-schema-sync.mjs && DATABASE_URL=file:/tmp/mg-schema-dummy.db bunx prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma --script > ../desktop/assets/schema.sql
scripts.prepare:assets: bun run prepare:schema-sql && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp assets/schema.sql dist/assets/schema.sql && cp ../contracts/.vk-hash assets/.vk-hash && cp ../contracts/.vk-hash dist/assets/.vk-hash
scripts.build:ui: env $(grep -v '^#' .env | grep -v '^$' | xargs) NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5050 NEXT_PUBLIC_INDEXER_MODE=lite NEXT_PUBLIC_MINA_NETWORK_DOMAIN=testnet bash -c 'cd ../ui && bun run build'
scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/preload.js dist/ && cp src/preload-setup.js dist/ && mkdir -p dist/auro dist/assets && cp src/auro/page.html dist/auro/ && cp src/assets/setup.html dist/assets/
scripts.build: bun run prepare:backend && bun run prepare:assets && bun run build:ui && bun run stage && bun run build:electron
scripts.dev: bun run prepare:backend && bun run prepare:assets && bun run build:ui && bun run stage && bun run build:electron && env $(grep -v '^#' .env | grep -v '^$' | xargs) electron --no-sandbox .
